sentences.target: Tu as oublié ton bagage sur le siège.
sentences.reading: /ty a ublje tɔ̃ baɡaʒ syʁ lə sjɛʒ/

translations.fr: Tu as oublié ton bagage sur le siège.
translations.ipa: /ty a ublje tɔ̃ baɡaʒ syʁ lə sjɛʒ/
translations.en: You forgot your bag on the seat.
translations.es: Olvidaste tu equipaje en el asiento.
translations.de: Du hast dein Gepäck auf dem Sitz vergessen.
translations.it: Hai dimenticato il tuo bagaglio sul sedile.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把行李忘在座位上了。
translations.yue: 你喺個位度遺低咗你嘅行李。
translations.ru: Ты забыл свой багаж на сиденье.
translations.pt: Você esqueceu sua bagagem no assento.
translations.he: שכחת את המזוודה שלך על המושב.
translations.vi: Bạn quên hành lý trên ghế.
translations.nl: Je bent je bagage op de stoel vergeten.
translations.uk: Ти забув свій багаж на сидінні.
translations.hu: Ott felejtetted a csomagodat az ülésen.
translations.hi: तुम अपना सामान सीट पर भूल गए।
translations.el: Ξέχασες τις αποσκευές σου στο κάθισμα.
translations.nb: Du glemte bagasjen din på setet.
translations.sv: Du glömde ditt bagage på sätet.
translations.cs: Zapomněl jsi své zavazadlo na sedadle.
translations.da: Du glemte din bagage på sædet.
translations.ja: 座席にお荷物をお忘れです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal); grammatical subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb (present indicative, 2sg) used to form the passé composé with the past participle ‘oublié’.
Past participle of the lexical verb; forms the compound past with ‘as’. No agreement since the direct object follows.
Possessive determiner (2sg), masculine singular; modifies ‘bagage’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (COD) of ‘oublier’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘siège’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Je cherche mon bagage près du tapis.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ mɔ̃ baɡaʒ pʁɛ dy tapi/

translations.fr: Je cherche mon bagage près du tapis.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ mɔ̃ baɡaʒ pʁɛ dy tapi/
translations.en: I’m looking for my bag near the belt.
translations.es: Estoy buscando mi equipaje cerca de la cinta.
translations.de: Ich suche mein Gepäck am Gepäckband.
translations.it: Cerco il mio bagaglio vicino al nastro.
translations.ko: 수하물 벨트 근처에서 제 수하물을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在传送带旁边找我的行李。
translations.yue: 我喺行李帶附近搵我嘅行李。
translations.ru: Я ищу свой багаж у ленты.
translations.pt: Estou procurando minha bagagem perto da esteira.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המזוודה שלי ליד המסוע.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm hành lý của mình gần băng chuyền.
translations.ar: أبحث عن أمتعتي قرب سير الحقائب.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn bagage bij de band.
translations.uk: Я шукаю свій багаж біля стрічки.
translations.hu: A szalag mellett keresem a csomagomat.
translations.hi: मैं बेल्ट के पास अपना सामान ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω τις αποσκευές μου κοντά στον ιμάντα.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter bagasjen min ved båndet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari bagasi saya di dekat ban berjalan.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter mitt bagage vid bandet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min bagage ved båndet.
translations.ja: ベルトの近くで自分の荷物を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of ‘cherche’.
Main verb (present indicative, 1sg), transitive; takes ‘mon bagage’ as direct object.
Possessive determiner (1sg), masculine singular; modifies ‘bagage’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (COD) of ‘cherche’.
Adverb used in the fixed expression ‘près de’ meaning ‘near’; combines with ‘du’ to introduce a location.
Contraction of the preposition ‘de’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the complement ‘tapis’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘de’ (via ‘du’).

sentences.target: On pèse chaque bagage avant l’embarquement.

translations.fr: On pèse chaque bagage avant l’embarquement.
translations.en: We weigh each bag before boarding.
translations.es: Pesamos cada maleta antes del embarque.
translations.de: Wir wiegen jedes Gepäckstück vor dem Boarding.
translations.ko: 탑승 전에 각 수하물의 무게를 잽니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在登机前称每件行李。
translations.yue: 我哋喺登機前會秤每件行李。
translations.ru: Мы взвешиваем каждую сумку перед посадкой.
translations.pt: Pesamos cada mala antes do embarque.
translations.he: אנחנו שוקלים כל מזוודה לפני העלייה למטוס.
translations.tr: Uçağa binmeden önce her bagajı tartıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cân từng kiện hành lý trước khi lên máy bay.
translations.ar: نزن كل حقيبة قبل الصعود إلى الطائرة.
translations.nl: We wegen elk stuk bagage voor het instappen.
translations.uk: Ми зважуємо кожну валізу перед посадкою.
translations.hi: हम बोर्डिंग से पहले हर बैग का वजन करते हैं।
translations.pl: Ważymy każdą sztukę bagażu przed wejściem na pokład.
translations.el: Ζυγίζουμε κάθε αποσκευή πριν την επιβίβαση.
translations.nb: Vi veier hvert kolli før ombordstigning.
translations.id: Kami menimbang setiap bagasi sebelum naik pesawat.
translations.sv: Vi väger varje väska före ombordstigning.
translations.ro: Cântărim fiecare bagaj înainte de îmbarcare.
translations.cs: Před nástupem na palubu vážíme každé zavazadlo.
translations.da: Vi vejer hvert stykke bagage før boarding.
translations.ja: 搭乗前に荷物を一つずつ量ります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (‘one/we’); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb (present indicative, 3sg with ‘on’); transitive, taking ‘chaque bagage’ as direct object.
Invariable determiner meaning ‘each’; selects a singular count noun (‘bagage’).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (COD) of ‘pèse’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘l’embarquement’).
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; determiner of ‘embarquement’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: Votre bagage doit passer au contrôle.

translations.fr: Votre bagage doit passer au contrôle.
translations.en: Your bag must go through screening.
translations.es: Su equipaje debe pasar por el control de seguridad.
translations.de: Ihr Gepäck muss durch die Sicherheitskontrolle gehen.
translations.it: Il suo bagaglio deve passare al controllo di sicurezza.
translations.zh-Hans: 您的行李必须通过安检。
translations.pt: Sua bagagem deve passar pelo controle de segurança.
translations.he: המטען שלך חייב לעבור בידוק ביטחוני.
translations.vi: Hành lý của bạn phải qua kiểm tra an ninh.
translations.ar: يجب أن تمر أمتعتك عبر التفتيش الأمني.
translations.nl: Uw bagage moet door de veiligheidscontrole.
translations.uk: Ваш багаж має пройти контроль безпеки.
translations.hu: A csomagjának át kell mennie az ellenőrzésen.
translations.hi: आपके सामान को सुरक्षा जांच से गुजरना होगा।
translations.pl: Twój bagaż musi przejść kontrolę bezpieczeństwa.
translations.el: Οι αποσκευές σας πρέπει να περάσουν από τον έλεγχο.
translations.id: Bagasi Anda harus melalui pemeriksaan keamanan.
translations.sv: Ditt bagage måste gå genom säkerhetskontrollen.
translations.ro: Bagajul dumneavoastră trebuie să treacă prin controlul de securitate.
translations.cs: Vaše zavazadlo musí projít bezpečnostní kontrolou.
translations.ja: お荷物は保安検査を通す必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal singular); modifies ‘bagage’.
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb (present indicative, 3sg) expressing obligation; takes the infinitive ‘passer’ as complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as complement of ‘doit’; denotes the required action.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ and article ‘le’; introduces the destination ‘contrôle’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’ (via ‘au’).

Je cherche mon bagage près du tapis.
On pèse chaque bagage avant l’embarquement.
Votre bagage doit passer au contrôle.

/ʒə ʃɛʁʃ mɔ̃ baɡaʒ pʁɛ dy tapi/

On pèse chaque bagage avant l’embarquement.
Votre bagage doit passer au contrôle.
ipa: /ty a ublje tɔ̃ baɡaʒ syʁ lə sjɛʒ/

en: You forgot your bag on the seat.
I’m looking for my bag near the belt.
We weigh each bag before boarding.
Your bag must go through screening.
